The '''Excavator droid Mark II''' was a bipedal [[mining droid]] model that was used at the [[Peragus Mining Facility]] during and prior to [[3951 BBY]]. It was similar to the [[Mining droid Mark II]], but was painted red.

All such droids were destroyed when the Mining Facility itself was consumed in a chain-reaction explosion triggered by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Hammerhead-class cruiser|''Hammerhead''-class cruiser]] [[Harbinger (Hammerhead-class)|''Harbinger'']], which had been seized by the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Sion]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
